arg.name: use_rviz
arg.description: Whether to launch RViz or not.

arg.name: end_effector_frame
arg.description: The name of the end-effector link frame

arg.name: urdf_file_path
arg.description: The relative filepath to the URDF file for the robot

arg.name: motion_plugin_type
arg.description: The type of motion plugin to use in PFieldManager (e.g., 'franka')

arg.name: base_x
arg.description: X position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_y
arg.description: Y position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_z
arg.description: Z position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_roll
arg.description: Roll of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_pitch
arg.description: Pitch of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_yaw
arg.description: Yaw of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: demo_name
arg.description: Name of the demo to run (options: pf_demo, sphere_robot, xarm_demo, local_minima_demo)

node.name: fixed_to_base_broadcaster
node.args: $(var base_x) $(var base_y) $(var base_z) $(var base_roll) $(var base_pitch) $(var base_yaw) $(var rviz_fixed_frame) $(var base_frame)
